# ui.landbirds_v4 { #app.ui.landbirds_v4 }

`ui.landbirds_v4`



## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [landbirds_v4_tab](#app.ui.landbirds_v4.landbirds_v4_tab) | Historical Model tab — same layout shell as Current Model. |

### landbirds_v4_tab { #app.ui.landbirds_v4.landbirds_v4_tab }

```python
ui.landbirds_v4.landbirds_v4_tab()
```

Historical Model tab — same layout shell as Current Model.
Server wiring for v4 to be implemented in a future sprint.
